headline: Oppenheimer Raises PT on KLA (KLAC) Stock to $1,900
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the Best Semiconductor Stocks to Invest In Now. On March 13, Oppenheimer lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $1,900 from $1,800, while keeping an “Outperform” rating, as reported by The Fly. As per the firm, KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC)’s Investor Day was significantly more positive than the expectations, raising the near […]

headline: KLA Rival Calibrates New Buy Zone As Top Funds Scoop Up Shares
summary: The semiconductor equipment group ranks a stellar No. 3 among the 197 groups Investor's Business Daily tracks and features industry powerhouses like Advanced Energy Industries and ASML. Metrology leader Nova has also etched its name on that list as Nova stock calibrates a new buy point.

headline: Can Lam Research's Systems Business Sustain Growth Amid AI Capex Boom?
summary: LRCX rides on AI-driven chip demand as Systems revenues rise 28% and new tech gains traction, but can the company sustain momentum through 2026 growth targets?

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Global Oil Prices Jump; Micron Falls Despite Blowout Earnings
summary: Futures wavered with global oil prices above $115. Micron slid despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows Wednesday.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Backs Off $100; Micron Skids Despite Blowout Earnings
summary: Futures dipped as U.S. oil prices hit $100 while Micron fell despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows on cautious Powell comments.
